CustomField.description: Month when item is planned for publication
CustomField.formula: CASE (MONTH( Planned_Publication_Date__c ), 1,'01 Jan', 2,'02 Feb', 3,'03 Mar', 4,'04 Apr', 5,'05 May', 6,'06 Jun', 7,'07 Jul', 8,'08 Aug', 9,'09 Sep', 10,'10 Oct', 11,'11 Nov', 12,'12 Dec','')
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Month when item is planned for publication
CustomField.label: Planned Month
